raw_consumer_statement:
Complaint against Barclays bank for illegal behavior regarding a filed dispute. 
Company has a dispute team located in XXXX whose service is unprofessional and violates my consumer rights here. 
Dispute is with XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ( XXXX XXXX ) a CA based company. 
Purchased a leather sofa using a Barclays credit card. Item was delivered damaged. 
Contacted company who refused to replace the defective item Contacted Barclays credit card company- filed a dispute for a charge back. 
Barclays illegally denied the dispute -displayed unfair consumer treatment and violation of the Fair Credit Billing Act.

Requested re-opening of dispute but bank refuses to act in contravention to the Act.
